Agibuild.Fulora
Table of Contents

Class GlobalShortcutService

Namespace
Agibuild.Fulora
Assembly
Agibuild.Fulora.Runtime.dll

Manages OS-level global hotkey registration with policy governance and lifecycle management. Delegates actual OS calls to an IGlobalShortcutPlatformProvider.

public sealed class GlobalShortcutService : IGlobalShortcutService, IDisposable
Inheritance
object
GlobalShortcutService
Implements
IGlobalShortcutService
IDisposable

Parameters

provider IGlobalShortcutPlatformProvider
policy IWebViewHostCapabilityPolicy

Properties

ShortcutTriggered

Push event fired when a registered global shortcut is triggered by the user.

public IBridgeEvent<GlobalShortcutTriggeredEvent> ShortcutTriggered { get; }

Methods

Dispose()

Performs application-defined tasks associated with freeing, releasing, or resetting unmanaged resources.

GetRegistered()

Returns all currently registered shortcut bindings.

public Task<GlobalShortcutBinding[]> GetRegistered()

Returns

Task<GlobalShortcutBinding[]>

IsRegistered(string)

Returns whether a shortcut with the given ID is currently registered.

shortcutId string

Register(GlobalShortcutBinding)

Registers a global shortcut with the OS.

Returns

Task<GlobalShortcutResult>

Unregister(string)

Unregisters a previously registered global shortcut.
